title: MORNING
content:
MORNING
  • Morning Reading: "He looked around him as if seeing the world for the first time... Beautiful was the world, colourful was the world, strange and mysterious was the world! Here was blue, here was yellow, here was green, the sky and the river flowed, the forest and the mountains were rigid, all was beautiful, all was mysterious and magical."
  • Today's Intention: I will look at the world with fresh eyes today, noticing the beauty in one ordinary thing.
NIGHT
  • Night Reading: "Meaning and reality were not hidden somewhere behind things, they were in them, in all of them."
  • Reflection: What ordinary thing did I see today that was actually extraordinary? What did it teach me?
Day 9
MORNING
  • Morning Reading: "I will learn from myself, be my own pupil; I will learn from myself the secret of Siddhartha."
  • Today's Intention: I will engage fully with one of my senses today—the taste of my food, the sound of music, the feeling of the air.
NIGHT
context: From document: A 30-Day Journey with Siddhartha: Aligning the Path with Daily Life — chunk 14 (chunk 14/29)
